basic.question_text: 列出所有导演姓名，**不重复**，按字母顺序排列。
basic.question_context: 使用 DISTINCT 去重 + ORDER BY 排序。
basic.reference_sql: SELECT DISTINCT director FROM movies ORDER BY director;
accept_alternatives: SELECT DISTINCT director FROM movies ORDER BY director ASC;
hints: DISTINCT 去重，ORDER BY 列名 排序
SELECT DISTINCT director FROM movies ORDER BY director;
SELECT DISTINCT director FROM movies ORDER BY director;

basic.question_text: 查询**最近 4 部**发行的电影（按年份降序），返回所有列。
basic.question_context: ORDER BY year DESC 降序 + LIMIT 4。
basic.reference_sql: SELECT * FROM movies ORDER BY year DESC LIMIT 4;
hints: ORDER BY year DESC 从新到旧排列，LIMIT 4 取前4条
SELECT * FROM movies ORDER BY year DESC LIMIT 4;
SELECT * FROM movies ORDER BY year DESC LIMIT 4;

basic.question_text: 查询按片名**字母顺序排列**的前 5 部电影。
basic.question_context: ORDER BY title ASC（默认） + LIMIT 5。
basic.reference_sql: SELECT * FROM movies ORDER BY title ASC LIMIT 5;
accept_alternatives: SELECT * FROM movies ORDER BY title LIMIT 5;
hints: ORDER BY title 默认升序排列，LIMIT 5 限制行数
SELECT * FROM movies ORDER BY title ASC LIMIT 5;
SELECT * FROM movies ORDER BY title ASC LIMIT 5;

basic.question_text: 查询按片名字母顺序排列的**第 6 到第 10 部**电影。
basic.question_context: 使用 LIMIT 5 OFFSET 5 跳过前5部。
basic.reference_sql: SELECT * FROM movies ORDER BY title LIMIT 5 OFFSET 5;
hints: OFFSET 5 跳过前5行，LIMIT 5 取接下来的5行
SELECT * FROM movies ORDER BY title LIMIT 5 OFFSET 5;
SELECT * FROM movies ORDER BY title LIMIT 5 OFFSET 5;

basic.question_text: 查询所有电影，按**片长从长到短**排列。
basic.reference_sql: SELECT title, length_minutes FROM movies ORDER BY length_minutes DESC;
hints: ORDER BY length_minutes DESC 从长到短排列
SELECT title, length_minutes FROM movies ORDER BY length_minutes DESC;
SELECT title, length_minutes FROM movies ORDER BY length_minutes DESC;

intermediate.question_text: 查询每位导演的**电影数量**和导演姓名，按电影数量降序排列。
intermediate.question_context: 使用 COUNT(*), GROUP BY, ORDER BY。
intermediate.reference_sql: SELECT director, COUNT(*) AS movie_count FROM movies GROUP BY director ORDER BY movie_count DESC;
accept_alternatives: SELECT director, COUNT(*) FROM movies GROUP BY director ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC;
hints: GROUP BY director 分组，COUNT(*) 统计每组数量
SELECT director, COUNT(*) AS movie_count FROM movies GROUP BY director ORDER BY movie_count DESC;
SELECT director, COUNT(*) AS movie_count FROM movies GROUP BY director ORDER BY movie_count DESC;

intermediate.question_text: 查询按**发行年份升序**排列，同一年份的电影按**片名降序**排列的所有电影标题和年份。
intermediate.question_context: ORDER BY 可以跟多个列：ORDER BY col1 ASC, col2 DESC。
intermediate.reference_sql: SELECT title, year FROM movies ORDER BY year ASC, title DESC;
hints: ORDER BY year ASC, title DESC 先按年份升序，同年份内按片名降序
SELECT title, year FROM movies ORDER BY year ASC, title DESC;
SELECT title, year FROM movies ORDER BY year ASC, title DESC;

intermediate.question_text: 查询发行年份中**有多少个不同的年份**（即电影跨越了多少年）。
intermediate.question_context: COUNT(DISTINCT 列名) 统计不同值的个数。
hints: COUNT(DISTINCT year) 统计不重复年份的数量
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT year) FROM movies;
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT year) FROM movies;

intermediate.question_text: 查询**片长最短的 3 部电影**的标题和片长。
intermediate.reference_sql: SELECT title, length_minutes FROM movies ORDER BY length_minutes ASC LIMIT 3;
hints: ORDER BY length_minutes ASC 升序排列（短到长），LIMIT 3 取前3
SELECT title, length_minutes FROM movies ORDER BY length_minutes ASC LIMIT 3;
SELECT title, length_minutes FROM movies ORDER BY length_minutes ASC LIMIT 3;

intermediate.question_text: 查询所有电影，跳过片长最短的 5 部，取接下来的 5 部按片长升序排列。
intermediate.question_context: 组合 ORDER BY, LIMIT, OFFSET。
intermediate.reference_sql: SELECT title, length_minutes FROM movies ORDER BY length_minutes ASC LIMIT 5 OFFSET 5;
hints: ORDER BY length_minutes ASC, LIMIT 5 OFFSET 5 跳过前5取接下来5
SELECT title, length_minutes FROM movies ORDER BY length_minutes ASC LIMIT 5 OFFSET 5;
SELECT title, length_minutes FROM movies ORDER BY length_minutes ASC LIMIT 5 OFFSET 5;

challenge.question_text: 查询皮克斯电影中**每十年（decade）的电影数量**。例如 1990s 对应 1990-1999。按 decade 排序。
challenge.question_context: 用 (year / 10) * 10 计算年代。需要 GROUP BY。
challenge.reference_sql: SELECT (year / 10) * 10 AS decade, COUNT(*) FROM movies GROUP BY decade ORDER BY decade;
hints: (year / 10) * 10 通过整数除法计算出 decade（1995→1990）
SELECT (year / 10) * 10 AS decade, COUNT(*) FROM movies GROUP BY decade ORDER BY decade;
SELECT (year / 10) * 10 AS decade, COUNT(*) FROM movies GROUP BY decade ORDER BY decade;

challenge.question_text: 查询**每部电影的片长在所有电影中的排名**（按片长降序，给出序号）。
challenge.question_context: 使用窗口函数 ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY length_minutes DESC)。
challenge.reference_sql: SELECT title, length_minutes, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY length_minutes DESC) AS rank FROM movies;
hints: ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY length_minutes DESC) 为每行分配排名序号
SELECT title, length_minutes, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY length_minutes DESC) AS rank FROM movies;
SELECT title, length_minutes, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY length_minutes DESC) AS rank FROM movies;

challenge.question_text: 查询每位导演电影的总片长，按总片长降序排列，只显示前 3 位导演。
challenge.question_context: GROUP BY, SUM, ORDER BY, LIMIT 的组合使用。
challenge.reference_sql: SELECT director, SUM(length_minutes) AS total_minutes FROM movies GROUP BY director ORDER BY total_minutes DESC LIMIT 3;
hints: SUM(length_minutes) 计算每组总片长
SELECT director, SUM(length_minutes) AS total_minutes FROM movies GROUP BY director ORDER BY total_minutes DESC LIMIT 3;
SELECT director, SUM(length_minutes) AS total_minutes FROM movies GROUP BY director ORDER BY total_minutes DESC LIMIT 3;

challenge.question_text: 查询**在 2005 年之前和之后（含2005）各有多少部电影**。
challenge.question_context: 用 CASE WHEN 分组统计。
challenge.reference_sql: SELECT CASE WHEN year < 2005 THEN 'Before 2005' ELSE '2005 and after' END AS period, COUNT(*) FROM movies GROUP BY period;
hints: CASE WHEN year < 2005 THEN 'Before 2005' ELSE '2005 and after' END 分类
SELECT CASE WHEN year < 2005 THEN 'Before 2005' ELSE '2005 and after' END AS period, COUNT(*) FROM movies GROUP BY period;
SELECT CASE WHEN year < 2005 THEN 'Before 2005' ELSE '2005 and after' END AS period, COUNT(*) FROM movies GROUP BY period;

challenge.question_text: 查询片长排名前 50% 的电影（即片长在中位数以上的）。用ORDER BY 和 LIMIT。已知有 14 部电影。
challenge.question_context: 计算 14 * 50% = 7，取片长最长的 7 部。
challenge.reference_sql: SELECT title, length_minutes FROM movies ORDER BY length_minutes DESC LIMIT 7;
hints: 14 部的 50% 是 7 部，ORDER BY length_minutes DESC LIMIT 7
SELECT title, length_minutes FROM movies ORDER BY length_minutes DESC LIMIT 7;
SELECT title, length_minutes FROM movies ORDER BY length_minutes DESC LIMIT 7;
